response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation, real-time systems, or secure embedded development — key requirements for this role. Their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with only a brief, outdated C++ stint at National Instruments. There is no evidence of experience with message brokers, IEC 62443, MQTT, multi-threaded C++ architectures, or industrial protocols, making them a poor fit despite strong general engineering skills.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and create educational content
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in relevant industrial contexts
Lacks exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, message brokers, or industrial protocols
Cloud and security experience is web-focused, not industrial automation-oriented
